assignments.name: The Agentic AI Discovery Interview
assignments.due: As listed on Canvas (in-class activity, ~10–15 minutes)
assignments.summary: Use an AI agent to interview you and surface concrete places where agentic AI could act on your behalf.
assignments.details: Follow the steps in the activity handout: paste the analyst prompt, answer follow-ups, and export or screenshot your opportunity table for submission if required.

assignments.name: Module 01 readings and orientation
assignments.summary: Orientation to agentic AI themes and where AI earns its keep in real workflows.
assignments.details: See m01_where_ai_earns_its_keep in the syllabus pack for themes and discussion prep.
